content: Astro is at v7.0.9 as of July 2026 (Astro 7.0 released June 22 2026, focused on build speed 15-61% faster via Rust compiler rewrite; Astro 6 shipped Feb 10 2026). Minimum Node.js version for Astro 7 is 22.12+. Official GitHub Pages deploy guide at docs.astro.build/en/guides/deploy/github/ recommends withastro/action for CI.
